# terrible_pcg_alpaca_operator_alpaca_group (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the group.

### Optional

- `new_name` (String) Optional new name for the group. If the group specified in `name` exists, it will be renamed to this value. If the group does not exist, a new group will be created using this value.
- `state` (String) Desired state of the group.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Indicates whether any change was made to the group
- `id` (Number) Numeric ID of the group (if known or newly created)
- `msg` (String) Human-readable message describing the outcome
